content.body: (Also if anyone just wants to weigh in async on the issue that would be totally fine too)

```
const print = globalThis?.console?.log ?? globalThis.print
if (!Object.is(NaN, -NaN)) print('Wrong')
const toBytes = (n) => {
  const res = new Float64Array(1)
  res[0] = n
  const out = new Uint8Array(res.buffer)
  return out.toHex ? out.toHex() : [...out].map(x => x.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('')
}
print(toBytes(NaN))
print(toBytes(-NaN))
```
